description: Nighttime parking lot surveillance showing vehicles entering and exiting, with a suspicious figure near a parked car
Busy urban intersection during rush hour with multiple vehicles and pedestrians crossing
Indoor retail store footage showing customers browsing aisles and approaching checkout counters
Subway platform during evening commute with passengers waiting and boarding trains
Warehouse exterior with loading dock area, showing delivery trucks and workers during daytime operations
University campus quad area with students walking between buildings during midday
Highway overpass camera showing multi-lane traffic flow with occasional lane changes and merging
Bank lobby interior with customers in queue, tellers at windows, and security guard at entrance
Public park during evening hours with joggers, dog walkers, and groups gathered on benches
Construction site perimeter camera showing workers, heavy machinery, and fenced boundary area
